LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MARYANN ALLOO'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL CONFIRM THE ARBITRATION AWARD OF $49,436.16, WHICH INCLUDES COSTS OF ARBITRATION AND ATTORNEYS FEES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MARYANN ALLOO'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR AS A DUPLICATE ENTRY. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER ALLOO, MARYANN RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT KOLL, RANDALL $49,436.16 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $49,436.16, SEE SCANNED DOC

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CLAIRE Y. CHOO, ESQ., 650.592.5400, FOR PETITIONER MARYANN ALLOO; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MARYANN ALLOO's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. The Court will confirm the arbitration award of $49,436.16, which includes costs of arbitration and attorneys fees. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Notice Of Hearing On Peititon To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CLAIRE Y. CHOO, ESQ., 650.592.5400, FOR PETITIONER MARYANN ALLOO; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MARYANN ALLOO's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Off calendar as a duplicate entry. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER MARYANN ALLOO'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
is continued on the court's own motion to March 27, 2013 to give Ms. Alloo the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Ms. Alloo must deliver courtesy copies of all papers filed in support of the petition to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 27, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
